Create a highly complex, multi-tiered industrial step-down facility with combined horizontal grids, cantilever tiers, and structural trusses using absolute 3D vector coordinates: 1. GLOBAL BOUNDARIES & MULTI-LEVEL ELEVATIONS: - Total Structural Length (X-Axis): 60000mm (60 meters) - Total Structural Width (Y-Axis): 30000mm (30 meters) - Foundation Concrete Level: Z = 0 - Level 1 (Partial Mezzanine): Z = 3800mm (Spanning from X=0 to X=30000 only) - Level 2 (Suspended Cantilever Deck): Z = 7600mm (Spanning from X=30000 to X=60000, projecting out from Y=0 to Y=10000) - Main Roof Eave Line (Top of Main Columns): Z = 12000mm (12 meters) - Roof Apex / Ridge Line: Z = 15000mm (Centered at Y=15000) - Global Grid Spacing: 6000mm increments along the X-Axis (11 framing lines total from X=0 to X=60000) 2. HEAVY CONCRETE FOUNDATION: - Element Type: IfcSlab - Dimensions: Length=60000mm, Width=30000mm, Thickness=600mm - Execution: Generate a solid volumetric foundation slab from X=0 to 60000, Y=0 to 30000, extruding downwards from Z=0 to Z=-600. 3. DUAL-GRID VERTICAL COLUMNS - 33 Units Total: - Profile: HEB450 (Heavy main load-bearing columns) - Execution: - Grid Line Y=0: 11 columns placed from X=0 to X=60000 every 6000mm. Extrude vertically from Z=0 to Z=12000. - Grid Line Y=15000 (Mid-Span Spine): 11 columns placed from X=0 to X=60000 every 6000mm. Extrude vertically from Z=0 to Z=12000. - Grid Line Y=30000: 11 columns placed from X=0 to X=60000 every 6000mm. Extrude vertically from Z=0 to Z=12000. 4. LEVEL 1 PARTIAL MEZZANINE FRAME (מפלס ביניים תחתון - חצי מבנה): - Primary Beams: 12 Units of HEB300 running horizontally at exactly Z_start=3800, Z_end=3800, connecting columns between X=0 to X=30000 along grid lines Y=0, Y=15000, and Y=30000. - Secondary Floor Joists: 31 Lines of IPE180 running transversely along the Y-axis (from Y=0 to Y=30000), evenly spaced every 1000mm inside the X=0 to X=30000 zone. - Floor Deck: IfcSlab, 50mm thickness, sitting flat on top of the framework at Z=3800. 5. LEVEL 2 SUSPENDED CANTILEVER DECK (מפלס תלוי מרחף - חצי מבנה שני): - Cantilever Beams: 6 Units of IPE500 projecting horizontally along the Y-axis from the spine columns (at Y=15000) out to the floating edge (Y=5000) at exactly Z_start=7600, Z_end=7600. Placed only on framing lines from X=30000 to X=60000. - Tension Hanger Rods: 6 Units of CHS89x6 connecting upper column anchors (at Y=15000, Z=12000) diagonally down to the outer floating tips of the cantilever beams (at Y=5000, Z=7600). - Secondary Joists: 16 Lines of IPE140 running longitudinally along the X-axis (from X=30000 to X=60000) at Z=7600, spaced every 600mm across the cantilever width. 6. ROOF GABLE TRUSSES (מערכת אגדי מסבך גג): For each of the 11 main framing lines at Z=12000, build a heavy open-web gable truss: - Top Rafter Chords: Dual-slope IPE300 profiles running from front/back column tops (Y=0 and Y=30000 at Z=12000) up to the central Apex at (Y=15000, Z=15000). - Bottom Chord Ties: Horizontal HEA220 profiles connecting the column tops at exactly Z_start=12000, Z_end=12000. - Web Members: 8 Units per frame of RHS90x90x6 cross-connecting the top and bottom chords in a Warren truss pattern. 7. ROOF PURLINS & WALL GIRTS (מרישי גג וקירות): - Roof Purlins: 14 lines of Z250x2.5 running longitudinally along the X-axis (from X=0 to X=60000), sitting on top of the sloped rafter chords. - Perimeter Wall Girts: 12 lines of C180x2.0 running horizontally along the X-axis at Y=0 and Y=30000, evenly divided vertically between Z=0 and Z=12000. 8. TOTAL X-BRACING SYSTEM (מערכת אלכסוני הקשחה מלאה): - Vertical Wall Bracing: In the first bay (X=0 to 6000) and the last bay (X=54000 to 60000), add cross-bracing lines using CHS76x4 profiles running diagonally from column bases (Z=0) to column tops (Z=12000) on both external walls. - Roof Plane Bracing: Diagonal X-bracing paths using CHS60x4 profiles connecting the corners of the upper rafter chords in the first, middle, and last bays. 9. SAFETY GUARDRAILS (מעקי בטיחות): - Profile: RHS50x50x4 - Execution: Run continuous safety guardrail lines at an offset height of Z=8700 (1100mm above the level 2 deck) along all exposed edges of the Level 2 floating cantilever deck. Parse this multi-tier structural segment matrix, map the physical points into the pure vector compiler logic, ensure all 33 heavy columns and nested horizontal/sloped beam elements are generated, and render the complete step-down model.
